---
title: 'PES: Proactive Event Scheduling for Responsive and Energy-Efficient Mobile
  Web Computing'
author:
- Yu Feng
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/isca19-pes.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/pes-proactive-event-scheduling-for-responsive-and-energy-efficient-mobile-web-computing
journ: ISCA
year: 2019
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
teaser: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uQ__PAULjgs
pub_number: 31
---
